SECTION 1
The individual might express deep shock and a plea for justice, stating that the ruling is entirely wrong. He would likely argue that the evidence presented was flawed and misleading. Such a moment brings a heavy weight upon the soul of the accused.

SECTION 2
This situation could lead to a long struggle for the truth. The silver lining might appear only after years of fighting. Sir, I beg you to reconsider this grave error. We must wrap up this case with fairness and integrity. stranger, you must understand the pain of this false judgment.
